calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Text Ruling

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Feb-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Lillian Ng, Esq. for and with Carol Kwong (Petitioner/Administrator) also appearing via Zoom.

Ms. Ng addressed the Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause stating that this was her fault, that it was the end of the year, and that this didn't make her calendar. The Court stated that it was not satisfied with the reason and ordered Ms. Ng to pay sanctions in the amount of $250.00 within 10 days to the court. The Court stated that there is an issue with regard to the funds on deposit not being within the FDIC limits for insurance, noted that Ms. Ng thinks that it can be waived, and asked Ms. Ng if she could provide any authority to support her position. Ms. Ng stated that the FDIC issue was discussed, that her client's sister waived the FDIC requirement, that she does not have any authority to provide to the Court, that her client is not claiming fees, that she understands that funds in excess of $250,000.00 are uninsured, and that currently $1,182,000.00 is in one bank account. The Court addressed Ms. Ng stating that it is not prepared to grant the petition until there is compliance with the probate code.

The Petition for Final Distribution, for Settlement of First and Final Report on Waiver of Account and for Approval and Allowance of Statutory Commission and Fees and Costs for Attorney for Administrator is continued to February 22, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.
Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Cho. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-28-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Carol Kwong and Attorney Lillian Ng to appear on Jan-25-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why Estate Funds have not been deposited consistent with FDIC regulations. Attorney Lillian Ng is Ordered to Show Cause on Jan-25-2023 as to why she should not be sanctioned in the amount of $250 for failure to appear. The subject matter is continued to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
